summary: Fix 3 high-severity correctness issues identified in Phase 1 review: response data contract mismatch, subscription leak, and infinite reconnection loop.
approach: All 3 issues are small, isolated correctness fixes in the client layer (WorkflowCommander, +page.svelte, stores/index.ts). Each fix is clearly scoped with a known fix direction. Merged into a single task since all are sub-5-min changes touching independent code paths.

waves.label: Fix all 3 correctness issues (independent file changes)
